wiki.summary: “no sleep” is the twelfth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. It showcases Nettspend going back to his original roots, rapping over a Jerk beat for the first time in a long time. The Jerk instrumental was produced by frequent collaborator cranes and consists of bit-crushed synths, smooth bass and fast-paced percussion. wiki.content: “no sleep” is the twelfth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. It showcases Nettspend going back to his original roots, rapping over a Jerk beat for the first time in a long time. The Jerk instrumental was produced by frequent collaborator cranes and consists of bit-crushed synths, smooth bass and fast-paced percussion. On December 26, 2025, the track would be previewed twice by Nettspend on an Instagram live. On February 12, 2026, the track would be played in its entirety on an Australian radio station during an interview leading up to the release of early life crisis. Nettspend released “no sleep” on March 6, 2026. “no sleep” by Nettspend was produced by cranes. Read more on Last.fm.
